data.name: Hentai Furry Pony
data.detailed_description:
🐴 Hentai Furry Pony is a gentle hentai puzzle game that invites you to a cozy barn on a countryside ranch, where a sweet pony girl with sparkling eyes and a warm smile awaits to be pieced together… revealing the sweetest moments of her life. 🌾




✨ Game features:
💖 30 cozy levels that unveil her romantic, rural charm!
🏆 30 achievements — for true pony lovers and pleasure seekers!
🖼️ Gallery — keep all unlocked illustrations in one warm, welcoming place!


🎚️ Difficulty levels:


  • Easy — relax and enjoy her smile!


  • Normal — dive into her eyes and uncover even more!


  • Hard — discover her shy, yet playful side… piece by piece 😉


🎶 Soft country jazz and lo-fi melodies set the mood of a calm rural evening — for peaceful rest or steamy imagination. 🎧🐴

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 10
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: 2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
